title: DeadCraft
description: Deadcraft aims to be a basic Zombie Apocalypse
body:
Deadcraft is a thrilling survival mod where blood becomes your greatest enemy...
Bleeding When you start bleeding, you'll leave a trail of blood splatters that draw in every undead mob within a 64-block radius. Bandages are your lifeline, providing a quick way to stop the bleeding and reduce the risk of attracting nearby threats.
Build structures to keep out the dead...
Barricades You can craft wooden barricades, but be careful—they’ll apply the bleed effect if you run into them
But your first true challenge comes with the Horde Moon, an event where a swarm of zombies will hunt you relentlessly

Support me on Ko-Fi.
